title: Ballistic Missile Mod
description: Take control of the skies and redefine warfare in Minecraft.
body:
# 🚀 Ballistic Missile Mod 

**Take control of the skies and redefine warfare in Minecraft.**

The Ballistic Missile Mod is a high-tech expansion for Minecraft players who want more than just TNT. It introduces a complete strategic artillery system featuring advanced missiles, specialized launch infrastructure, and precision targeting. Whether you are defending your base or laying siege to an enemy fort, this mod provides the heavy firepower you need.

### Core Features
**Advanced Missile Arsenal:**
Our missiles aren't just blocks; they are dynamic entities with smooth flight animations and custom Java models.

**Standard Ballistic Missile:** A reliable, cost-effective projectile for medium-range tactical strikes.

**Heavy Ballistic Missile:** A massive, high-yield weapon designed for maximum destruction. It features a high-fidelity model that dominates the skyline before launch.

**The Launch Pad (3x3):** A heavy-duty structural base required for all missile operations.  

**Precision Placement:** Missiles are hard-coded to require the Launch Pad as their base; without it, the launch sequence cannot be initiated.  

**Remote Control:** A handheld device used to designate ground targets.

**Simple Operation:** Synchronize your remote with a Launch Pad, aim at your target, and watch the sky.

### Technical Mechanics & Physics
**Re-engineered Explosion Logic**
We’ve moved beyond standard Minecraft "knockback." This mod uses a custom math-based explosion system.

**Balanced Knockback:** Instead of mobs flying randomly into the stratosphere, our "Smart Knockback" calculates impulse based on the distance from the epicenter. This keeps the gameplay feeling grounded and tactical.

**High-Impact Damage:** Explosions are designed to be devastating to entities while maintaining a balanced radius for block destruction.

### Visual & Particle Effects
**Dynamic Smoke Trails:** Missiles emit thick, realistic smoke plumes that react to the projectile's velocity. 

### Quick Start Guide
**Deploy the Pad:** Place the Missile Launch Pad on a flat surface. Note that its hitbox covers a full 3x3 area.  

**Load the Missile:** Right-click the center of the pad with your chosen missile (Standard or Heavy).

C**alibrate the Remote:** Hold the Remote Control and link it to your station.

**Engage:** Target a block in the distance and Right-Click to launch. Clear the area!

### 📌 Future Roadmap
> [ ] Long-range ICBMs with coordinate-based input.
> 
> [ ] Radar stations and Anti-Missile Defense Systems (SAMs).
